case_title: ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES VS. RYAN BRADLEY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES AS TO DEFENDANT BRADLEY, RYAN BRADLEY, LYNNE DOES 1-V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BRADLEY, RYAN BRADLEY, LYNNE
